data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of a specific SMS reminder message, but the evidence does not include any confirmation that the exact message "Reminder: You have a dental cleaning tomorrow at 10am with Dr. Lee. Reply CONFIRM or call 555-0123." was sent or is configured in the system. While there are various passed validations related to SMS reminders, none directly address the specific content of the required reminder message, indicating a gap in coverage.
gaps: The specific SMS reminder message for dental cleaning is not confirmed as sent or configured.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
